title: Write Your Daily Schedule
learningGoal: The learner will write 3 short sentences stating their age, what day of the week it is, and the current time.
instructions: Write a short 3-sentence paragraph in Japanese. First, state your age using 'Watashi wa X-sai desu'. Second, state what day of the week it is today using 'Kyou wa Y-youbi desu'. Finally, state the current hour using 'Ima, Z-ji desu'.

contentItems.text: You can make up an age, day, and time if you prefer. Just make sure the grammar structure is correct.

writingPrompt: Write three sentences: 1) Your age. 2) The day of the week. 3) The current time.
promptGoal: To construct accurate 'A wa B desu' sentences incorporating time and numerical vocabulary.
referenceHints: Sentence 1: Watashi wa [Number] sai desu. (Or hatachi desu).

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: わたしは にじゅうごさいです。きょうは かようびです。いま、よじです。
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: Watashi wa ni-juu-go-sai desu. Kyou wa kayoubi desu. Ima, yo-ji desu.
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: I am 25 years old. Today is Tuesday. Now it is 4 o'clock.
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect grammar. Also correctly uses the exception 'yo-ji' for 4 o'clock.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: わたしは はたちです。きょうは にちようびです。いま、じゅうじです。
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: Watashi wa hatachi desu. Kyou wa nichiyoubi desu. Ima, juu-ji desu.
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: I am 20 years old. Today is Sunday. Now it is 10 o'clock.
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfectly uses the exception 'hatachi' for 20 years old without adding 'sai'.

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the learner state their age correctly using 'sai' (or 'hatachi')?
Did the learner state the day correctly using 'Kyou wa... youbi desu'?
Did the learner state the time correctly using 'Ima... ji desu' and avoid saying 'yon-ji' or 'kyuu-ji'?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: わたしは じゅうはっさいです。きょうは げつようびです。いま、さんじです。
acceptableAlternates: Any set of 3 sentences that follow the prescribed grammar formats.
adminCorrectAnswerSet.grammarBaseline: A wa B desu structure applied to Time, Day, and Age.

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic writing! You can successfully construct sentences about daily schedules.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please review the lesson on numbers. Make sure every sentence ends with 'desu'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Make sure you didn't accidentally write 'yon-ji' for 4 o'clock, or 'ni-juu-sai' for 20 years old.

hintText: Make sure to write 'youbi' carefully. It has a long 'o' sound (yo-u-bi).
commonMistakes: Writing 'watashi wa hatachi sai desu' (you don't need 'sai' with hatachi).
